product: Standalone pipelines on serverless general compute (Beta)
tagline: Standalone pipelines, including materialized views and streaming tables, can now be created from a notebook running on serverless general compute.
what_it_does: Standalone pipelines, including materialized views and streaming tables, can now be created from a notebook running on serverless general compute. Standalone pipelines (renamed from pipelines on Databricks SQL) can be created using SQL or Python. Standalone pipelines are in Beta.
why_it_matters: Cost attribution and control are not available.
plain_summary: Standalone pipelines, including materialized views and streaming tables, can now be created from a notebook running on serverless general compute. Standalone pipelines (renamed from pipelines on Databricks SQL) can be created using SQL or Python.
key_takeaway: Standalone pipelines, including materialized views and streaming tables, can now be created from a notebook running on serverless general compute.
